title: Why Neanderthals Might Be Our Cousins After All - David Reich
summary: David Reich discusses evidence suggesting Neanderthals may be closer evolutionary cousins to modern humans than previously understood. The discussion covers genetic and paleontological perspectives on human evolutionary history and inter-species relationships.
